data_window: 2026-06-12 14:00 to 2026-06-15 14:06 Asia/Shanghai; GitTrend AI Agent page updated June 15, 2026; GitTrend AI Coding Assistant, AI Infrastructure, and AI Skills pages checked live; GitHub repository README and visible metadata pages checked live on June 15, 2026.
source_summary: Live GitTrend topic pages, GitHub repository README/metadata pages, and automation memory to avoid repeating recent picks unless there was stronger new growth or product signal. No clone, install, Docker run, or GitHub API audit was performed.
trend_observations: The strongest signal is a split between agent internet reach infrastructure and concrete artifact workflows: Agent Reach and Firecrawl make external web/social context agent-ready, while PPT Master and Open Design turn agent work into editable/exportable deliverables. Coding-agent GUI surfaces and skills-as-quality-gates remain active, but prompt-only and guide-only repositories still need downgrading.
assumptions: Prioritized product-shaped repositories with runnable UI/CLI/API, install instructions, examples, screenshots, docs, and explicit user workflows. GitTrend star deltas are directional only. Repeated abnormal star spikes, prompt-only skills, guide repositories, pure learning material, and unclear clone/skeleton repos were downgraded or skipped.
markdown_report:
# Daily AI Native Product Radar - 2026-06-15

Top 3: Panniantong/Agent-Reach, hugohe3/ppt-master, openchamber/openchamber. Main trend: agent internet reach and real artifact export are becoming product surfaces. See data/runs/2026-06-15.md for the full Markdown brief.

top_projects.summary: Installs cross-platform internet read/search capabilities for AI agents across Twitter/X, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, RSS, and related sources.
top_projects.audience: Agent users and researchers doing community research, product sentiment checks, video/social-source reading, or broad web monitoring.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Packages external-world access as an installable, health-checked, updateable agent capability instead of one-off platform scripts.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #1, marked NEW 2026, with 28.8k stars, 2.4k forks, and +1.3k today; GitHub showed 283 commits plus docs, scripts, tests, and config directories.
top_projects.runnability: README provides install/update prompts, platform descriptions, health-check posture, and security guidance; usable but high-risk for login/cookie-based platforms.
top_projects.recommended_action: Test with throwaway or low-risk accounts on GitHub, YouTube, and Reddit first; avoid primary-account cookies until the credential model is reviewed.

top_projects.summary: Generates genuinely editable PowerPoint decks from documents, including native shapes, animations, speaker notes, audio narration, and template reuse.
top_projects.audience: People and teams producing consulting decks, reports, presentations, or reusable content where editable PPTX matters.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Uses Claude/Codex/Cursor-style agents as the executor while the project supplies workflow, parsing, design spec, SVG-to-PPTX export, examples, and skill packaging.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #10 with 27.5k stars, 2.5k forks, and +301 today; GitHub showed 741 commits and docs, examples, projects, and skills directories.
top_projects.runnability: README includes a live demo, downloadable example PPTX files, pip install path, npx skills add path, and multi-agent usage instructions.
top_projects.recommended_action: Run one existing Markdown/report through it for an 8-slide Chinese editable deck; inspect editability, typography, and template-fill quality.

top_projects.summary: Desktop, browser, and mobile interface for OpenCode agent sessions, diffs, tool output, dev servers, and cross-device continuity.
top_projects.audience: OpenCode and terminal-agent users who need a visible control plane for coding-agent sessions.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Turns coding-agent work into a GUI control surface with session continuity, diff review, settings, tool output, remote access, and PWA/desktop usage.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #2 with 5.0k stars, 501 forks, and +977 today; GitHub showed 1,665 commits plus Dockerfile, docker-compose, packages, docs, and scripts.
top_projects.runnability: README shows screenshots and desktop/browser/phone positioning; repository includes Vite/TypeScript app structure and Docker assets.
top_projects.recommended_action: Compare against Vibe Kanban and JetBrains CC GUI for permissioning, diff review, remote access, and session-state UX.

top_projects.summary: Searches, scrapes, crawls, maps, interacts with pages, and returns LLM-ready Markdown, JSON, screenshots, and structured data for AI agents.
top_projects.audience: RAG, research automation, data extraction, and agent product teams that need reliable web context.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Makes web context an agent infrastructure layer through MCP, CLI skills, an Agent endpoint, structured output, and browser interaction actions.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #8 with 132.8k stars, 7.8k forks, and +397 today; GitHub showed 5,649 commits, 59 issues, and 322 PRs.
top_projects.runnability: README includes Python, Node, cURL, CLI examples, MCP configuration, agent onboarding skill, hosted service, and self-host files.
top_projects.recommended_action: Use it as the API/hosted-service comparison to Agent Reach; run the same research prompt through both and compare stability, cost, and source traceability.

top_projects.summary: Local-first Claude Design/Figma alternative that connects coding-agent CLIs to a desktop design studio for prototypes, web, slides, images, video, and exports.
top_projects.audience: Product builders, PMs, design engineers, and Codex/Claude/Cursor users who need prompt-to-artifact workflows.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Treats the agent as the design engine while skills, MCP, design systems, sandbox preview, BYOK, and HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export are product primitives.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #7 with 64.8k stars, 7.3k forks, and +466 today; GitHub showed 2,272 commits and 0.10.0 release notes.
top_projects.runnability: Repository exposes desktop/web/apps/plugins/skills/design-system paths and prior README review showed install/export workflows.
top_projects.recommended_action: Continue tracking; next useful audit is the Codex MCP install path and actual HTML/PPTX artifact quality.

top_projects.summary: Production-grade engineering skills and slash commands covering spec, plan, build, test, review, simplify, and ship.
top_projects.audience: Developers and teams who want AI coding agents to follow stronger engineering quality gates.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Encodes senior-engineering workflows into agent-callable commands, hooks, scripts, agents, commands, skills, and plugin metadata.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #2, marked NEW 2026, with 59.5k stars, 6.4k forks, and +1.1k today; GitHub showed 240 commits.
top_projects.runnability: README documents seven slash commands, automatic skill activation, and /build auto; product UI is weaker than the Top 5, but workflow packaging is concrete.
top_projects.recommended_action: Extract the /spec, /review, and /ship quality gates for comparison with the local Codex workflow instead of adopting wholesale.

top_projects.summary: Multi-agent LLM financial trading framework with research, sentiment, trader, portfolio manager, and decision-log workflows.
top_projects.audience: Quant/finance researchers and builders studying vertical multi-agent workflows.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Structures a finance workflow as collaborating LLM agents rather than a single chat assistant.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Agent ranked it #9 with 86.2k stars, 16.6k forks, and +326 today; README shows a 2026-05 v0.2.5 release and visible CLI, Docker, tests, and package directories.
top_projects.runnability: Repository includes pyproject, requirements, Dockerfile, docker-compose, CLI, tests, and tradingagents package.
top_projects.recommended_action: Study as a vertical multi-agent product pattern only; do not use outputs as investment advice.

top_projects.summary: Browser-extension account hub for New API/Sub2API relay accounts, balances, usage, auto check-ins, one-click keys, pricing, health checks, and channel management.
top_projects.audience: Heavy AI tool users and small teams juggling multiple relay accounts, model gateways, or China-market AI API providers.
top_projects.ai_native_angle: Operationalizes the account, cost, key, and availability layer beneath AI-native tools.
top_projects.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #3 with 3.9k stars, 272 forks, and +475 today; prior audit found Chrome/Edge/Firefox distribution signals.
top_projects.runnability: Browser-extension product shape is clear, but credential storage and permissions need review.
top_projects.recommended_action: Use as an AI API ops-pattern reference; audit credential handling before adopting.

watchlist.summary: Small CLI-style SWE agent that remains active on GitTrend after prior promotion.
watchlist.audience: Developers comparing compact coding agents and SWE-bench-oriented tools.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Pushes agent usefulness through a minimal command-line loop rather than a large framework.
watchlist.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Coding Assistant ranked it #5 with +568 today.
watchlist.runnability: Previously reviewed as CLI-shaped; not re-audited today.
watchlist.recommended_action: Keep watching benchmark claims and real CLI ergonomics.

watchlist.summary: Java framework for agent-oriented programming and LLM applications.
watchlist.audience: Enterprise Java teams exploring agent systems.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Moves agent orchestration patterns into Java stacks.
watchlist.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #2 with +546 today.
watchlist.runnability: Needs deeper README/install/example audit before promotion.

watchlist.summary: Provider-agnostic TypeScript AI SDK for streaming chat, tool calling, agents, and multimodal apps.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Could make AI app primitives framework-native and type-safe.
watchlist.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #10 with +158 today.
watchlist.runnability: Docs/package maturity not fully audited today.
watchlist.recommended_action: Watch for API stabilization and examples.

watchlist.summary: Open-source AI gateway for 100+ LLMs with failover, load balancing, cost control, and tracing.
watchlist.ai_native_angle: Treats model routing, reliability, cost, and observability as shared AI infrastructure.
watchlist.growth_signal: GitTrend AI Infrastructure ranked it #5 with +366 today.
watchlist.runnability: Needs direct README/control-plane audit before Top promotion.
watchlist.recommended_action: Watch for deployable dashboard and real production case studies.

skipped_projects.skip_reason: Very high and repeated star/commit headline numbers need GitHub API or community validation before treating growth as confirmed.
Primarily taste/style guidance and skill methodology; lacks auditable runtime or product interface.
Repeated abnormal star velocity and very high headline numbers require API/community validation.
Educational/tutorial repository rather than product-shaped AI-native tool.
Single-file methodology/CLAUDE.md-style project without runnable product workflow.
Open-source Claude Code skeleton claim and unusual fork/star structure make originality and legitimacy unclear.
